key.name: api-key
key.summary: API key for local / cloud OpenAI-compatible API

key.name: gemini-cli-path
key.summary: Path or command name for the Gemini CLI binary

key.name: claude-cli-path
key.summary: Path or command name for the Claude CLI binary

key.name: copilot-cli-path
key.summary: Path or command name for the Copilot CLI binary

key.name: auto-paste
key.summary: Automatically paste result into the active window

key.name: show-notifications
key.summary: Show GNOME notifications for start / done / error events

key.name: auto-check-quota
key.summary: Periodically check API quota in the background
key.description: If enabled, ping the API every 5 minutes to update the quota percentage in the tray menu.

key.name: auto-start-lms
key.description: If enabled, automatically attempt to start the LM Studio server if a local AI connection fails.

key.name: history-size
key.summary: Number of past transformations to keep in history

key.name: actions-json
key.default: '[{"id":"fix-grammar","name":"Fix Grammar","prompt":"You are a grammar correction tool. Correct the following text. Return *only* the corrected text, with no explanation, preamble, or markdown formatting.","hotkey":"<Control><Super>o","enabled":true,"backend":"default"},{"id":"improve-text","name":"Improve Text","prompt":"You are an editing assistant. Improve the following text for clarity, flow, and impact. Return *only* the improved text, with no explanation, preamble, or markdown formatting.","hotkey":"<Control><Super>p","enabled":true,"backend":"default"},{"id":"explain-code","name":"Explain Code","prompt":"You are a senior developer. Explain the following code concisely. Output markdown format.","hotkey":"<Control><Super>e","enabled":true,"backend":"default"},{"id":"refactor-code","name":"Refactor Code","prompt":"You are an expert software engineer. Refactor the following code to be cleaner and more efficient. Output ONLY the code, without markdown blocks or explanation.","hotkey":"<Control><Super>r","enabled":true,"backend":"default"},{"id":"translate","name":"Translate DE ↔ EN","prompt":"Detect the language of the following text. If it is German, translate it to English. If it is English, translate it to German. Return *only* the translated text, with no explanation, preamble, or markdown formatting.","hotkey":"<Control><Super>t","enabled":true,"backend":"default"},{"id":"summarize","name":"Summarize","prompt":"Summarize the following text concisely. Return *only* the summary, with no explanation, preamble, or markdown formatting.","hotkey":"","enabled":true,"backend":"default"},{"id":"make-professional","name":"Make Professional","prompt":"Rewrite the following text in a highly professional, business-appropriate tone. Return *only* the rewritten text, with no explanation, preamble, or markdown formatting.","hotkey":"","enabled":true,"backend":"default"},{"id":"expand-text","name":"Expand / Elaborate","prompt":"Expand on the following text. Add more detail and context while maintaining the original meaning. Return *only* the expanded text, with no explanation, preamble, or markdown formatting.","hotkey":"","enabled":true,"backend":"default"}]'
key.description: Each action: {id, name, prompt, hotkey, enabled, backend}
